overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a color-shifting neon-lit indoor corridor, transitioning through a rainy graffiti-covered concrete underpass and glass-ceiling walkway, and concluding along a rain-soaked waterfront promenade with palm trees and distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit indoor shopping corridor with vending machines

events.description: ceiling lights shift from green to warm yellow-orange
ceiling lights shift from yellow to pink and purple hues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor observing the shifting neon ceiling lights and wall advertisements

entered.detail: elongated ceiling with color-changing neon light panels
dark-colored vending machine against the left wall
illuminated advertisement screens lining both walls
scattered papers and litter on the tiled floor
structural column in the center of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor with color-shifting neon ceiling lights cycling through green, yellow, and pink hues. Digital billboards line both walls while trash and debris litter the paved floor. The camera moves forward past a vending machine and support pillars in an empty indoor commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approaching exit with large digital displays

events.description: passing a pedestrian standing in the corridor
approaching the bright exit at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the corridor exit, passing other pedestrians and cardboard boxes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard featuring two figures with FERUID text

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the corridor, the camera approaches a large Feruid billboard at the far end. The lighting remains neon and pink-hued. A pedestrian walks toward the camera in the center of the frame, and cardboard boxes appear on the left side as the exit brightens ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy concrete underpass with graffiti walls

events.description: exiting the indoor corridor into the open underpass area
heavy rain begins falling, wetting the concrete ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked underpass with water visible falling and pooling on the ground

entered.detail: rough concrete walls with weathered surfaces
walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
staircase leading upward on the right side
black trash bins against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically as the camera exits the indoor corridor into a rainy concrete underpass. Heavy rain falls visibly, wetting the ground. The walls are covered in graffiti, and a concrete staircase ascends on the right. The lighting shifts from neon to a darker, mixed artificial and ambient night lighting.

events.description: entering the modern covered walkway with transparent glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking under the glass canopy with rain visible falling on the ceiling above

entered.detail: transparent glass ceiling panels showing rain falling above
sleek dark support columns with textured surfaces

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a modern covered walkway with a glass ceiling through which heavy rain is visible. The environment shifts from gritty concrete to cleaner architectural lines with digital billboards on the walls. The floor shows wet reflections from the ambient lighting as the camera moves toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees in heavy rain

events.description: exiting the covered walkway onto the open waterfront promenade
passing a pedestrian walking ahead on the wooden path

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked wooden waterfront promenade with city lights visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shorts walking ahead on the wooden walkway

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the promenade
wet wooden plank walkway reflecting lights
metal railing along the water's edge
distant illuminated buildings across the water
bright neon business signs including EL GAUCHO

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide waterfront promenade with heavy rain falling. Palm trees line the wooden walkway, and the city skyline glows in the distance across the water. The camera passes a pedestrian in green shorts while walking along the wet wooden deck, with neon signs and streetlights illuminating the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit indoor corridor that gradually opens into a rain-soaked waterfront promenade. It begins in a narrow enclosed space where color-shifting ceiling lights cycle through green, yellow, and pink hues over a debris-strewn floor, moving past digital billboards and a vending machine toward a bright exit. As the camera passes a lone pedestrian and a large Feruid billboard, the scene transitions dramatically into a gritty concrete underpass where the neon glow gives way to dark, ambient night lighting and heavy rain falling against graffiti-covered walls. The environment then shifts from raw concrete to a modern covered walkway with a glass ceiling, where the camera glides over wet reflections and clean architectural lines. Finally, the path opens onto a wide wooden promenade lined with palm trees, moving past a pedestrian toward a glowing city skyline shimmering across the water under a persistent downpour.
